name: SLS Block 1
first: First American super-heavy launcher since Saturn V
description: NASA's flagship deep-space rocket. Two five-segment solid rocket boosters and a core stage with four RS-25 engines (the same engines that flew on Space Shuttle), topped by an Interim Cryogenic Propulsion Stage. Debuted on Artemis I (Nov 2022), sending an uncrewed Orion capsule around the Mond.
